query: SELECT id, name, neighborhood, categoryId FROM establishments WHERE name LIKE '%Herbalife%' OR name LIKE '%nutricion%' OR name LIKE '%Nutricion%' OR name LIKE '%Assessoria%' ORDER BY name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT id, name, neighborhood, categoryId FROM establishments WHERE name LIKE '%Herbalife%' OR name LIKE '%nutricion%' OR name LIKE '%Nutricion%' OR name LIKE '%Assessoria%' ORDER BY name;
